auth.accountDeleted: Your account and all associated data have been permanently deleted.
auth.invalidMagicLinkToken: Invalid or expired magic link. Please request a new one.
auth.magicLinkSent: If an account with that email exists, a login link has been sent.
auth.passwordResetSent: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.
auth.verificationSent: If an account with that email exists and is not verified, a verification link has been sent.
auth.verificationWrongAccount: This verification link is for a different account. A new verification email has been sent to the correct email address.
auth.emailChangeSent: A verification email has been sent to your new email address.
auth.invalidEmailChangeToken: Invalid or expired email change token.
auth.emailAlreadyInUse: This email address is already in use.

common.notAuthenticatedLogin: Not authenticated. Please log in first.

email.passwordResetExpiry: This password reset link will expire in 1 hour.
email.passwordResetIgnore: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.
email.passwordResetIntro: We received a request to reset the password for your TapShift account.
email.passwordResetPrompt: Click the button below to reset your password:
email.balanceIntro: Here is your balance report as of {date}.
email.balanceFooter: You receive this email because you enabled balance reports in your TapShift settings. You can change this in Settings.
email.welcomeExpiryNote: This verification link will expire in 24 hours.
email.welcomeIgnoreNote: If you didn't create a TapShift account, please ignore this email.
email.welcomeSecurityText: A new verification link was requested for your TapShift account. If you didn't request this, please contact support.
email.welcomeSubject: Welcome to TapShift - Please Verify Your Email
email.welcomeSubjectResend: TapShift - New Email Verification Link (Security Notice)
email.welcomeVerifyPrompt: Please verify your email address to get started:
email.magicLinkIntro: We received a request to sign in to your TapShift account.
email.magicLinkPrompt: Click the button below to sign in:
email.magicLinkExpiry: This login link will expire in 15 minutes.
email.magicLinkIgnore: If you didn't request this link, please ignore this email. No one can access your account without this link.
email.emailChangeIntro: You requested to change your email address to:
email.emailChangePrompt: Click the button below to verify your new email address:
email.emailChangeExpiry: This verification link will expire in 24 hours.
email.emailChangeIgnore: If you didn't request this change, please ignore this email. Your email address will remain unchanged.

payment.trialExpired: Your trial has expired or subscription is not active. Please subscribe to continue.
